title: CanaryCore
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/CBf94Wh.png)

# **_CanaryCore_**

CanaryCore's purpose is to provide a comfortable suite of utilities for staff to use accross all of their servers, to provide a standarized framework of commands, while being lightweight and optimized to its fullest.

# THIS PLUGIN REQUIRES A FREE LICENSE
How to get a free license? 
1. Join our [Discord](https://canary.cirosanchez.dev).
2. Go to #cmd
3. Execute the /getlicense CanaryCore command.
4. Put the license that the bot gives you in license.yml
5. You're good to go!

# [Documentation](https://canarydevelopment.gitbook.io/docs/) 🦄



## ColorResolvers! **(NEW)**

Tired of having to switch between MiniMessage and Legacy colors? CanaryCore features a revolutionary _**Color Resolver**_! This allows you to choose which coloring framework to use, Legacy (Using &a, &c, etc.) or MiniMessage (<red>, <blue>, etc. check out more at [MiniMessage Docs](https://docs.advntr.dev/minimessage/format.html))

## Development

CanaryCore is under heavy development and I plan to add functions daily! Please, to stay up to date, join my [Discord](https://canary.cirosanchez.dev)!

## Installation

CanaryCore requires **NO** dependencies, download the Jar and drag it to your folder! That's all!

## Features

Check all the features in the [Documentation](https://canarydevelopment.gitbook.io/docs)!

## Support

Here at Canary, we take support seriously, for that, please, join my [Discord](https://canary.cirosanchez.dev) where I provide 1:1 support to everyone.


Thank you so much for trying CanaryCore, big things are coming for Canary, if you're interested, join the [Discord](https://canary.cirosanchez.dev)!


Made with ❤️ by the Canary Development Team
